response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, React, and MongoDB directly matches the role's primary stack, with recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling aligning closely with the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates strong engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and breadth across multiple languages.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React stack with 6+ years fullstack experience
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, and architecture exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned
Kotlin not listed; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms era)
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective
